global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a game interface screenshot and clear calls to action.
global.main_message: Unlock rare gear with free rewards for new players.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A vibrant solid green background fills the entire canvas, providing a lively and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: Game interface screenshot
elements.description: A screenshot of a game interface featuring four circular icons arranged in a grid layout.

elements.label: PixelForge logo
elements.description: The logo 'PixelForge' is displayed in a bold, modern font at the top left corner.

elements.label: Icon decoration
elements.description: An additional decorative icon is positioned to the right of the logo, enhancing the visual appeal.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button labeled 'Watch now' is located at the bottom of the ad, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Gameplay icon
elements.description: A small gameplay-related icon is placed near the center, adding context to the ad's message.

elements.label: Additional icon
elements.description: A small decorative element positioned at the top right corner, contributing to the overall design.

elements.label: Reward message
elements.description: The text 'Unlock rare gear' is displayed prominently in a bold font, conveying the main offer.

elements.label: Additional reward text
elements.description: The phrase 'Free rewards for new players' is shown below the main message, providing further incentive.

elements.label: Gameplay icon
elements.description: Another small gameplay-related icon is located near the center, complementing the main screenshot.

elements.label: Additional icon
elements.description: A small decorative element positioned near the top left, enhancing the visual complexity.

elements.label: Main offer headline
elements.description: The headline 'Unlock rare gear Free rewards for new players' is prominently displayed in a large, eye-catching font.
elements.text_content: Unlock rare gear Free rewards for new players
